sentences.arabic: تُفَضِّلُ لَيْلَى الْعَمَلَ مِنْ مَنْزِلِهَا فِي بَعْضِ الْأَيَّامِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla nekim danima više voli raditi od kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Layla prefers working from home on some days.

sentences.arabic: تَقْضِي وَقْتًا أَطْوَلَ مَعَ عَائِلَتِهَا وَتُوَفِّرُ جُهْدَ التَّنَقُّلِ.
sentences.translation: Provodi više vremena sa svojom porodicom i štedi trud oko putovanja na posao.
sentences.translationEn: She spends more time with her family and saves the effort of commuting.

sentences.arabic: تُنَظِّمُ مَكْتَبَهَا الصَّغِيرَ بِعِنَايَةٍ لِتَكُونَ أَكْثَرَ إِنْتَاجِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Pažljivo organizuje svoju malu kancelariju kako bi bila produktivnija.
sentences.translationEn: She organizes her small office carefully to be more productive.
